falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would invalidate the HOLD signal, indicating a confirmed trend reversal rather than a continuation of the prior pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume spikes to 50% above the 30-day average on two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a blowoff top or bottom, contradicting the current HOLD and suggesting a decisive market move has occurred.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2022_may_luna drops below 60%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the historical pattern would invalidate the current call, proving the setup is not analogous to the 2022 scenario.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
